Hero.description: Discover the magic of our lands with safety, comfort, and a touch of unforgettable adventure.

About.subtitle: About Us
About.description: At <brand>VivaTrip</brand> we believe that traveling is much more than moving from one place to another: it is about living experiences that awaken the senses, connect with culture, and leave unforgettable memories.
About.essense_description: We design unique tours that combine adventure, history, nature, and gastronomy.

CustomAdventure.question: Need more information or want to plan a group adventure?
CustomAdventure.contact_text: If you have questions about our services, want more details about this tour, or are planning a special experience for a group of people, <contact>contact us.</contact>

Mission.title: MISSION
Mission.description: To inspire every traveler to discover the magic of Mexico with safety, comfort, and a touch of adventure. We want every experience to be a bridge between your curiosity and the cultural and natural richness that surrounds us.

Experiences.notice_description: The experience service <bold>does not include transportation to or from the meeting point</bold>. If required, transportation must be managed and covered directly by the client. The company assumes no responsibility for delays, setbacks, or expenses arising from external transportation hired by the participant.

Footer.brand_description: Unique experiences combining adventure, history, and culture in Mexico.

hero.title: Rely on experts
hero.description: We help you design unique tours that combine adventure, history, nature, and gastronomy.

modal.title: Request Received
modal.description: You will shortly receive your folio to pay for your quote.

content.title: Need more information or planning a group adventure?
content.description: If you have any questions about our services, would like more details about this tour, or are planning a special experience for a group, please contact us. Our team will be happy to offer personalized attention to help you organize a tailor-made adventure, adapted to your interests and needs. Whether you're looking for a cultural excursion, a day exploring cenotes, or a unique combination of activities in and around Tulum, we're here to support you and design the perfect experience for you and your group.

editorial.title: Description
editorial.subtitle: Need more information or want to plan a group adventure?
editorial.description: If you have questions about our services, want more details about this tour, or are planning a special experience for a group of people, contact us. Our team will be happy to offer you personalized attention to help you organize a tailor-made adventure, adapted to your interests and needs.

card.description: Experience football like a true local, enjoying <bold>transportation, tacos, drinks, and souvenirs</bold>. Immerse yourself in the game's excitement from start to finish, hassle-free, in a safe and authentic environment. During the World Cup, we offer live broadcast experiences with giant screens and a festive atmosphere, combining sports and unique gastronomy.

labels.name: Full Name
labels.details: Which match or experience are you looking for?

branding.description: Experience football like a true local, enjoying transportation, tacos, drinks, and souvenirs. We are here to support you and design the perfect experience for you and your group of friends.

editorial.title: Description
editorial.subtitle: Experience football like a true local, enjoying <white>transportation, tacos, drinks, and souvenirs.</white> Immerse yourself in the game's excitement from start to finish, hassle-free, in a safe and authentic environment.
editorial.description: Additionally, during the world cup, we offer special live broadcast experiences, where you can enjoy matches on giant screens alongside other fans, maintaining the same energy and passion felt at the stadium. A unique experience combining sports, gastronomy, and a festive atmosphere.

alerts.select_date: Please select a date for your adventure

guidelines.title: Booking Guidelines
guidelines.p1: All our experience services are <bold>subject to prior confirmation of availability</bold> by our team. Final validation will be sent once operational slots for the selected date are verified.
guidelines.options_title: In case of lack of space or technical unforeseen events on the requested date, the client may choose:
guidelines.option_a: Rescheduling to a <bold>new available date</bold> at no additional charge.
guidelines.option_b: Selection of an <bold>equivalent experience</bold> in the same area or with similar characteristics.

legal.label: Legal Notice
legal.text: In compliance with the Federal Consumer Protection Law, Viva Trip guarantees the right to clear information regarding service conditions. Any adjustment to the itinerary will always be made with the express consent of the booking holder.
